title: stelis intonsa
intro: Stelis intonsa is a species of orchid, specifically a type of epiphytic orchid found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
